steps.title: Use the persistence evidence
steps.content: The passage says the internet seemed to replace zines, but zines persist. It then supports that point by noting that Canada has enough zines today to support annual zine festivals.

steps.title: Draw the logical conclusion
steps.content: The continued presence of zines and zine festivals suggests that zines still matter as a form of expression. A shifts to online audiences, C is too general, and D contradicts the claim that zines challenge mainstream culture. The answer is B.
